prompt: Using the reference layout, create a modern 3D render of a living room with minimalist furniture on a rug, rendered with smooth shading and ambient lighting in computer graphics style.
prompt_refined: Generate an image. Referencing the layout from image 1, create a modern 3D render of a minimalist living room scene. The arrangement features a central oval rug, upon which a two-seater sofa is positioned on the right side, flanked by two single armchairs on the left (one in the top-left, one in the bottom-left), all facing towards the center. A square coffee table with a small teapot on its surface is centrally located on the rug, between the sofa and armchairs. The furniture should exhibit a clean, modern minimalist design. The entire scene should be rendered with smooth shading and soft, ambient lighting, maintaining a distinct computer graphics aesthetic.
objects: two-seater sofa on the right side of the rug, facing center
single armchair in the top-left of the rug, facing center
single armchair in the bottom-left of the rug, facing center
square coffee table centrally located on the rug
small teapot on the coffee table
furniture with clean, modern minimalist design
